name: security-encoding-audit
goal: Scan project for security vulnerabilities and encoding issues, then generate a markdown report

steps.name: analyze_project_structure
steps.description: Get project overview: languages, file counts, LOC, top dependencies

steps.name: security_scan
steps.description: Scan all source files for 10 vulnerability patterns

steps.name: dead_code_check
steps.description: Find unused imports and unreachable code in main Python files

steps.name: complexity_report
steps.description: Cyclomatic complexity analysis for high-complexity functions

steps.name: find_duplications
steps.description: Find duplicated code blocks across project

steps.name: encoding_detection_sample
steps.description: Detect encoding of a sample file that might have issues

steps.name: generate_report
steps.description: Generate markdown report from all findings
